description: Style Note Slip your feet into cosy comfort and look stylish effortlessly in this pair of black, red and grey striped ankle socks from manchester united. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this pair offers exemplary comfort. Product Details Made of a blended fabric for long lasting comfort Has a half cushion terry foot for shock absorption Inner arch support for a secure and stable fit Branding printed below the ribbed mouth Material and Care Blended Machine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean
